# CWE-301 — Reflection Attack in an Authentication Protocol (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-301-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: responds with HMAC of challenge using server-only key material.
func MutualAuth(c *gin.Context) {
	challenge := c.PostForm("challenge")
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(os.Getenv("AUTH_HMAC_KEY")))
	mac.Write([]byte(challenge))
	proof := hex.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"proof": proof})
}
